skills.description: Go testing patterns including Bubbletea TUI testing.

skills.name: grill-me
skills.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding, resolving each branch of the decision tree. Use when user wants to stress-test a plan, get grilled on their design, or mentions "grill me".

skills.name: sdd-apply

skills.name: sdd-design

skills.name: sdd-explore

skills.name: sdd-spec
skills.description: Write specifications with requirements and scenarios (delta specs for changes).

skills.name: sdd-tasks
skills.description: Break down a change into an implementation task checklist.

skills.name: sdd-verify
skills.description: Validate that implementation matches specs, design, and tasks.

skills.name: skill-creator
